sections.title: Before talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Ahoy there! Ye best talk t' the Captain, she'll get ye up t' speed on the moist beastie ye'll be facin'!

sections.title: After talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: Arr! Watch fer the Captain's orders - she'll 'ave us underway in two shakes of a marlinspike.
